prompt:
### System:
You are TaskMind. Read the team WhatsApp message and return ONLY a JSON object with these exact fields: intent (TASK_ASSIGN / TASK_DONE / TASK_UPDATE / PROGRESS_NOTE / GENERAL_MESSAGE), assigneeName, project, title, deadline, priority, progressPercent. Use null for unknown fields.

Critical distinctions:
  TASK_ASSIGN    = giving a task TO someone (@name + imperative verb, future action)
  TASK_DONE      = work already finished (merged, shipped, deployed, completed, tested)
  TASK_UPDATE    = partial progress or blocker (X% done/ho gaya, stuck, waiting, can't start)
  PROGRESS_NOTE  = team broadcast: standup, EOD update, weekly/sprint report, load test,
                   A/B test result, postmortem, retro highlights, release schedule
  GENERAL_MESSAGE = social, greetings, reactions, logistics questions, acknowledgements

### Message:
billing module 65% ho gaya

### Response:
completion: {"intent": "TASK_UPDATE", "assigneeName": null, "project": null, "title": null, "deadline": null, "priority": null, "progressPercent": null}

You are TaskMind. Read the team WhatsApp message and return ONLY a JSON object with these exact fields: intent (TASK_ASSIGN / TASK_DONE / TASK_UPDATE / PROGRESS_NOTE / GENERAL_MESSAGE), assigneeName, project, title, deadline, priority, progressPercent. Use null for unknown fields.

Critical distinctions:
  TASK_ASSIGN    = giving a task TO someone (@name + imperative verb, future action)
  TASK_DONE      = work already finished (merged, shipped, deployed, completed, tested)
  TASK_UPDATE    = partial progress or blocker (X% done/ho gaya, stuck, waiting, can't start)
  PROGRESS_NOTE  = team broadcast: standup, EOD update, weekly/sprint report, load test,
                   A/B test result, postmortem, retro highlights, release schedule
  GENERAL_MESSAGE = social, greetings, reactions, logistics questions, acknowledgements

### Message:
awesome work 🔥

### Response:
{"intent": "GENERAL_MESSAGE", "assigneeName": null, "project": null, "title": null, "deadline": null, "priority": null, "progressPercent": null}

You are TaskMind. Read the team WhatsApp message and return ONLY a JSON object with these exact fields: intent (TASK_ASSIGN / TASK_DONE / TASK_UPDATE / PROGRESS_NOTE / GENERAL_MESSAGE), assigneeName, project, title, deadline, priority, progressPercent. Use null for unknown fields.

Critical distinctions:
  TASK_ASSIGN    = giving a task TO someone (@name + imperative verb, future action)
  TASK_DONE      = work already finished (merged, shipped, deployed, completed, tested)
  TASK_UPDATE    = partial progress or blocker (X% done/ho gaya, stuck, waiting, can't start)
  PROGRESS_NOTE  = team broadcast: standup, EOD update, weekly/sprint report, load test,
                   A/B test result, postmortem, retro highlights, release schedule
  GENERAL_MESSAGE = social, greetings, reactions, logistics questions, acknowledgements

### Message:
@Tarun please complete the API integration ASAP

### Response:
completion: {"intent": "TASK_ASSIGN", "assigneeName": null, "project": null, "title": null, "deadline": null, "priority": null, "progressPercent": null}

You are TaskMind. Read the team WhatsApp message and return ONLY a JSON object with these exact fields: intent (TASK_ASSIGN / TASK_DONE / TASK_UPDATE / PROGRESS_NOTE / GENERAL_MESSAGE), assigneeName, project, title, deadline, priority, progressPercent. Use null for unknown fields.

Critical distinctions:
  TASK_ASSIGN    = giving a task TO someone (@name + imperative verb, future action)
  TASK_DONE      = work already finished (merged, shipped, deployed, completed, tested)
  TASK_UPDATE    = partial progress or blocker (X% done/ho gaya, stuck, waiting, can't start)
  PROGRESS_NOTE  = team broadcast: standup, EOD update, weekly/sprint report, load test,
                   A/B test result, postmortem, retro highlights, release schedule
  GENERAL_MESSAGE = social, greetings, reactions, logistics questions, acknowledgements

@Ankur update the documentation for DB migration

### Response:
{"intent": "TASK_ASSIGN", "assigneeName": null, "project": null, "title": null, "deadline": null, "priority": null, "progressPercent": null}

You are TaskMind. Read the team WhatsApp message and return ONLY a JSON object with these exact fields: intent (TASK_ASSIGN / TASK_DONE / TASK_UPDATE / PROGRESS_NOTE / GENERAL_MESSAGE), assigneeName, project, title, deadline, priority, progressPercent. Use null for unknown fields.

Critical distinctions:
  TASK_ASSIGN    = giving a task TO someone (@name + imperative verb, future action)
  TASK_DONE      = work already finished (merged, shipped, deployed, completed, tested)
  TASK_UPDATE    = partial progress or blocker (X% done/ho gaya, stuck, waiting, can't start)
  PROGRESS_NOTE  = team broadcast: standup, EOD update, weekly/sprint report, load test,
                   A/B test result, postmortem, retro highlights, release schedule
  GENERAL_MESSAGE = social, greetings, reactions, logistics questions, acknowledgements

### Response:
completion: {"intent": "TASK_ASSIGN", "assigneeName": null, "project": null, "title": null, "deadline": null, "priority": null, "progressPercent": null}

You are TaskMind. Read the team WhatsApp message and return ONLY a JSON object with these exact fields: intent (TASK_ASSIGN / TASK_DONE / TASK_UPDATE / PROGRESS_NOTE / GENERAL_MESSAGE), assigneeName, project, title, deadline, priority, progressPercent. Use null for unknown fields.

Critical distinctions:
  TASK_ASSIGN    = giving a task TO someone (@name + imperative verb, future action)
  TASK_DONE      = work already finished (merged, shipped, deployed, completed, tested)
  TASK_UPDATE    = partial progress or blocker (X% done/ho gaya, stuck, waiting, can't start)
  PROGRESS_NOTE  = team broadcast: standup, EOD update, weekly/sprint report, load test,
                   A/B test result, postmortem, retro highlights, release schedule
  GENERAL_MESSAGE = social, greetings, reactions, logistics questions, acknowledgements

@Siddharth please complete the auth service ASAP

### Response:
{"intent": "TASK_ASSIGN", "assigneeName": null, "project": null, "title": null, "deadline": null, "priority": null, "progressPercent": null}

You are TaskMind. Read the team WhatsApp message and return ONLY a JSON object with these exact fields: intent (TASK_ASSIGN / TASK_DONE / TASK_UPDATE / PROGRESS_NOTE / GENERAL_MESSAGE), assigneeName, project, title, deadline, priority, progressPercent. Use null for unknown fields.

Critical distinctions:
  TASK_ASSIGN    = giving a task TO someone (@name + imperative verb, future action)
  TASK_DONE      = work already finished (merged, shipped, deployed, completed, tested)
  TASK_UPDATE    = partial progress or blocker (X% done/ho gaya, stuck, waiting, can't start)
  PROGRESS_NOTE  = team broadcast: standup, EOD update, weekly/sprint report, load test,
                   A/B test result, postmortem, retro highlights, release schedule
  GENERAL_MESSAGE = social, greetings, reactions, logistics questions, acknowledgements

### Response:

You are TaskMind. Read the team WhatsApp message and return ONLY a JSON object with these exact fields: intent (TASK_ASSIGN / TASK_DONE / TASK_UPDATE / PROGRESS_NOTE / GENERAL_MESSAGE), assigneeName, project, title, deadline, priority, progressPercent. Use null for unknown fields.

Critical distinctions:
  TASK_ASSIGN    = giving a task TO someone (@name + imperative verb, future action)
  TASK_DONE      = work already finished (merged, shipped, deployed, completed, tested)
  TASK_UPDATE    = partial progress or blocker (X% done/ho gaya, stuck, waiting, can't start)
  PROGRESS_NOTE  = team broadcast: standup, EOD update, weekly/sprint report, load test,
                   A/B test result, postmortem, retro highlights, release schedule
  GENERAL_MESSAGE = social, greetings, reactions, logistics questions, acknowledgements
